# IBIGENT Studio — Developer Documentation

> Official docs for connecting AI tools (Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, Antigravity) to IBIGENT Studio over MCP. Documentation only — no source code.

## Start here
- [README (EN)](README.md)
- [README (KO)](README_ko.md)

## Guides (EN)
- [Getting Started](docs/en/getting-started.md)
- [MCP Connection](docs/en/mcp.md)
- [Claude Code](docs/en/claude-code.md)
- [Codex CLI](docs/en/codex.md)
- [Cursor](docs/en/cursor.md)
- [Antigravity](docs/en/antigravity.md)
- [Examples](docs/en/examples.md)
- [FAQ](docs/en/faq.md)
- [Troubleshooting](docs/en/troubleshooting.md)

## Official
- Website: https://www.ibigent.com
- Online docs: https://www.ibigent.com/docs/ibigent-studio/
- MCP server URL pattern: https://mcp.ibigent.com/mcp/<YOUR_KEY>
